use_cases: Display referral links and codes to encourage user sharing
Show referral status and tracking information
Provide shareable referral links for social distribution
Display reward or incentive information for successful referrals
Collect and manage referral signups within a dashboard
ai_summary: A referral card component designed to display referral links, codes, and tracking information. Typically features shareable buttons, copy functionality, and referral status indicators. Used in referral program implementations across SaaS, creator platforms, and e-commerce to gamify and incentivize user acquisition through word-of-mouth marketing.
